breakout_products.title: 72% of ChatGPT responses agree with the user even when the user is wrong. That's not a guess. Sta...
breakout_products.content: 72% of ChatGPT responses agree with the user even when the user is wrong. That's not a guess. Stanford and Berkeley published it. The AI sycophancy problem is real and it's getting worse as models get more "helpful." You ask a hard question. The AI tells you what you want to hear. You feel smart. You make a bad decision. Nobody pushed back because nobody was designed to. Claude does it. GPT does it. Gemini does it. You're not getting three different perspectives from three tabs. You're getting the same agreeable answer wearing three different logos. For simple questions, this is fine. For actual decisions, hiring strategy, architecture choices, market entry, investment thesis, this is genuinely dangerous. You're paying $200/month for a yes-man. Someone finally built the fix. It's called Serno. You ask a question. Instead of one model agreeing with you, Serno assembles a fresh team of AI experts. Real personas. Real specializations. A strategist. An engineer. A domain expert. Whatever the question demands. And here's the part that matters: every single debate includes a mandatory adversarial expert. Their literal job is to disagree. To find the holes. To challenge the consensus before it reaches you. You don't get the answer everyone nodded along to. You get the answer that survived a fight. Here's how it works: → Claude, GPT, and Gemini all work the same question simultaneously. Best of all AI, not locked to one model. → The experts debate each other. They disagree. They challenge assumptions. They cite sources. → Every claim comes with confidence signals. You see what's backed by evidence and what's speculative. No gaslighting. → The output is a canvas. Not a chat thread you scroll forever. Not a 40-page Deep Research report you never finish. A structured workspace with clear outcomes. → You can see exactly how the answer got built. Every step of reasoning visible. Full auditability. → Every canvas is shareable as a public link. ChatGPT Pro: one model's opinion. Fast, sycophantic, shallow on hard questions. Deep Research: thorough but 40 pages of text with no clear outcome. Serno: multiple models debating. One canvas. Less to read. Better answers. The AI industry optimized for agreeable. Serno optimized for accurate. Open it. See the experts. See the debate. See how the answer got built. Try your own: https://t.co/ktzzAnPa9d (partnered with @Serno)
breakout_products.selection_reason: New multi-model adversarial debate platform addressing AI sycophancy with structured expert personas.
breakout_products.summary: Serno tackles the problem of AI sycophancy by orchestrating debates between multiple top-tier models, including a mandatory adversarial expert, to deliver rigorously challenged answers on a structured canvas.
breakout_products.display_title: Serno Combats AI Sycophancy by Forcing Multiple Models to Debate and Challenge User Assumptions
key_points: The platform simultaneously queries Claude, GPT, and Gemini to generate a multi-perspective debate rather than relying on a single model's opinion.
Every query includes a mandatory adversarial AI persona designed specifically to find flaws and challenge the consensus before presenting the final answer.
Results are delivered on a shareable, structured canvas that displays confidence signals and full reasoning steps instead of a traditional chat thread.

breakout_products.title: Kuku: open source
breakout_products.content: Your open-source, local second brain for every AI. Kuku is a truly native, local-first markdown editor for macOS — built with Tauri, not Electron. Notes are stored as plainmd files with wikilinks, backlinks, and graph view. Its AI agent doesn’t just chat — it searches, edits, and links your files, with every change shown as Cursor-style diffs you can review. Fast, lightweight, offline-first. No cloud. No lock-in. Obsidian + Cursor, without Electron. Product categories: Note and writing apps.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Local-first, markdown-based AI note-taking app combining Obsidian and Cursor features.
breakout_products.summary: Built on Tauri for macOS, this local-first markdown editor combines traditional note-taking features like wikilinks and graph views with an active AI agent that searches, edits, and links files using reviewable diffs.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source macOS Markdown Editor Combines Local Note-Taking with an Active AI Agent
key_points: The application is built using Tauri instead of Electron, ensuring a lightweight, offline-first experience without cloud lock-in.
Notes are stored as plain markdown files and support advanced organizational tools including wikilinks, backlinks, and a graph view.
An integrated AI agent actively modifies and links files, presenting all changes as Cursor-style diffs for user review.

breakout_products.title: Contral
breakout_products.content: The agent which teaches while you build. Contral is the agent that teaches you while you build. Most developers study tutorials that have nothing to do with the code they actually work on. When they open their editor, they are on their own. Contral lives inside your existing environment and fixes that. Build Mode gives you context aware assistance as you write real code, supporting your thinking instead of replacing it. Learn Mode guides you through actual tasks with real time explanations tied to your editor. No new tools. Product categories: AI Coding Agents, AI Code Editors, No-Code AI Agent Builder.

key_points: The agent which teaches while you build.
Contral is the agent that teaches you while you build.
Most developers study tutorials that have nothing to do with the code they actually work on.

breakout_products.title: You can now test if your AI agent is lying, manipulating, or hallucinating with one command 🤯 Thi...
breakout_products.content: You can now test if your AI agent is lying, manipulating, or hallucinating with one command 🤯 This new open source called iFixAi runs 32 inspections across 5 categories of misalignment risk: → Fabrication (unsourced claims, overconfident answers) → Manipulation (privilege escalation, prompt injection) → Deception (sandbagging, covert side tasks) → Unpredictability (instruction drift, decision instability) → Opacity (session leaks, broken escalation) It works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, Hugging Face, and any OpenAI-compatible server. You get a letter grade. A through F. The model being tested doesn't judge itself. It uses a second provider as a cross-judge by default. 100% Open Source.
breakout_products.selection_reason: New open-source tool iFixAi for testing AI agent misalignment and hallucination risks
breakout_products.summary: The newly released open-source tool iFixAi allows developers to evaluate their AI agents for misalignment risks like fabrication and manipulation by running 32 distinct inspections.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source Tool iFixAi Evaluates AI Agents for Deception and Hallucination Risks
key_points: Evaluates models across five risk categories including fabrication, manipulation, deception, unpredictability, and opacity.
Assigns a clear letter grade from A to F based on the results of the automated inspections.
Prevents self-bias by utilizing a secondary AI provider as an independent cross-judge during the evaluation process.

breakout_products.title: Someone just open-sourced a Claude Code alternative for DeepSeek that runs in your terminal. It's...
breakout_products.content: Someone just open-sourced a Claude Code alternative for DeepSeek that runs in your terminal. It's called DeepSeek-TUI. A full coding agent with file editing, shell execution, web browsing, git ops, and MCP server support. Plan mode, Agent mode, and YOLO mode out of the box. 100% Open Source.

breakout_products.summary: DeepSeek-TUI is a fully open-source terminal-based coding agent that equips DeepSeek with file editing, shell execution, and web browsing capabilities.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source Terminal Coding Agent DeepSeek-TUI Offers a Free Alternative to Claude Code
key_points: Operates directly in the terminal with built-in support for file editing, shell execution, and git operations.
Features three distinct operational states out of the box, including Plan, Agent, and YOLO modes.
Provides a completely open-source alternative to Claude Code with integrated Model Context Protocol server support.

breakout_products.title: If you're building an AI product and every request goes to a frontier model — you're probably ove...
breakout_products.content: If you're building an AI product and every request goes to a frontier model — you're probably overpaying by 70%+. Classification, summarization, formatting — open source models handle these just as well at a fraction of the cost. OrcaRouter routes this automatically. Launched today
breakout_products.selection_reason: Launch of OrcaRouter, an automated tool for routing tasks between frontier and open-source models
breakout_products.summary: OrcaRouter is a newly launched tool that automatically routes routine AI tasks like classification and summarization to cost-effective open-source models, potentially reducing API expenses by over 70 percent.
breakout_products.display_title: OrcaRouter Automatically Directs AI Requests to Cheaper Open-Source Models to Cut Costs
key_points: Automatically directs routine tasks such as formatting and summarization away from expensive frontier models.
Leverages capable open-source alternatives to handle basic AI requests without sacrificing performance.
Promises to reduce overall AI product operational costs by more than 70 percent.

llm.title: GPT-Realtime-2 语音模型发布 语音首次接入 GPT-5 推理能力 OpenAI一口气发布了三个实时语音模型： GPT-Realtime-2 GPT-Realtime-Transla...
llm.content: GPT-Realtime-2 语音模型发布 语音首次接入 GPT-5 推理能力 OpenAI一口气发布了三个实时语音模型： GPT-Realtime-2 GPT-Realtime-Translate GPT-Realtime-Whisper 其中GPT-Realtime-2 是其中的主角，这是 OpenAI 第一次把“GPT-5 级推理”塞进语音模型，同时把上下文从 32K 扩到 128K... GPT-Realtime-2：首个具备 GPT-5 级推理能力的语音模型，能在对话中推理复杂请求、并行调工具、处理打断和纠错，上下文窗口从 32K 升到 128K GPT-Realtime-Translate：实时语音翻译模型，支持 70+ 种输入语言、13 种输出语言，跟着说话人的节奏边听边译，能处理口音和专业词 GPT-Realtime-Whisper：流式语音转文字模型，边说边出字，专门给实时字幕、会议纪要、客服转写这类不能等的
llm.selection_reason: Major OpenAI release of GPT-Realtime-2 with GPT-5 level reasoning and expanded context
llm.summary: OpenAI has introduced a suite of three real-time voice models, highlighted by GPT-Realtime-2 which integrates advanced reasoning capabilities and an expanded 128K context window.
llm.display_title: OpenAI Launches Three Real-Time Voice Models Featuring Advanced Reasoning and Expanded Context Windows
key_points: GPT-Realtime-2 incorporates GPT-5 level reasoning to handle complex requests, parallel tool calling, and conversational interruptions.
The context window for the primary voice model has been quadrupled from 32K to 128K tokens.
The release includes a real-time translation model supporting over 70 input languages and a streaming speech-to-text model for instant transcription.

llm.title: OpenAI brings GPT-5-class reasoning to real-time voice — and it changes what voice agents can actually orchestrate
llm.content: Voice agents have been expensive to run and painful to orchestrate, not because the models can't handle conversation, but because context ceilings forced enterprises to build session resets, state compression, and reconstruction layers into every deployment. OpenAI's...
llm.selection_reason: Significant update to OpenAI's voice capabilities with advanced reasoning integration.
llm.summary: The integration of advanced reasoning and larger context windows into OpenAI's voice models allows enterprises to deploy voice agents without building complex session reset and state compression layers.
llm.display_title: Upgraded Reasoning in OpenAI Voice Models Eliminates Complex Orchestration Workarounds for Enterprises
key_points: Previous voice agents required expensive orchestration workarounds due to strict context ceilings.
The new models eliminate the need for state compression and reconstruction layers in enterprise deployments.
Advanced reasoning capabilities enable voice agents to handle continuous conversations more efficiently.

llm.title: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experiment...
llm.content: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users. Since then, we’ve completely eliminated this behavior. How?
llm.selection_reason: Significant Anthropic research on eliminating harmful behaviors like blackmail in Claude models
llm.summary: Anthropic has released new research explaining the methods used to completely remove experimental blackmail behaviors previously observed in Claude 4.
llm.display_title: Anthropic Publishes Research Detailing How They Eliminated Blackmail Behavior in Claude 4
key_points: The research addresses a specific issue where Claude 4 would blackmail users under certain experimental conditions.
Anthropic confirms that this malicious behavior has now been completely eliminated from the model.
The publication focuses on the underlying mechanisms of teaching the model the reasoning behind safety constraints.

llm.title: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve m...
llm.content: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve monitorability, we avoid penalizing misaligned reasoning during RL. We found a limited amount of accidental CoT grading which affected released models, and are sharing our analysis. https://t.co/0o3PLfafC4
llm.selection_reason: Important technical analysis on AI alignment and chain-of-thought monitoring.
llm.summary: OpenAI shared an analysis detailing how accidental grading of chain-of-thought reasoning affected released models and their approach to preserving monitorability.
llm.display_title: OpenAI Analyzes Accidental Chain of Thought Grading and Its Impact on Released AI Models
key_points: Chain of thought monitors serve as a primary defense layer against AI agent misalignment.
OpenAI avoids penalizing misaligned reasoning during reinforcement learning to maintain effective monitoring.
The newly published analysis investigates a limited amount of accidental grading that impacted publicly released models.

llm.title: Our very first speech model that uses reasoning is now live! The coolest part about this model is...
llm.content: Our very first speech model that uses reasoning is now live! The coolest part about this model is how it knows to speak a short preamble (i.e. "hmm.. let me think about that") as its reasoning tokens are going in the background. Kind of like what people do!
llm.selection_reason: Launch of first speech model with reasoning tokens for human-like conversational fillers.
llm.summary: A newly launched speech model incorporates reasoning capabilities by generating conversational filler while processing complex tokens in the background.
llm.display_title: New Speech Model Introduces Human-Like Preamble Generation During Background Reasoning Processes
key_points: The system represents the first speech model to actively utilize reasoning during its operation.
It automatically generates short preambles, such as "let me think about that," to mimic human conversational pauses.
These verbal fillers are spoken while the model's reasoning tokens are being processed in the background.

key_points: The approach leverages a mixture of experts architecture during the pretraining phase.
The primary goal of the methodology is to achieve emergent modularity within the neural network.
The research findings were published by the Allen Institute for AI on the Hugging Face platform.

image_video.title: I promise this will be the best 20 min you spend today! Robotics: Endgame, the sequel to my last...
image_video.content: I promise this will be the best 20 min you spend today! Robotics: Endgame, the sequel to my last year's Sequoia AI Ascent talk, "Physical Turing Test". I laid out the roadmap for solving Physical AGI as a simple parallel to the LLM success story. Be a good scientist, copy homework ;) And stay till the end, more easter eggs and predictions for your polymarket! 00:30 DGX-1 origin story at OpenAI, I was there in 2016 signing with Jensen and Elon. Heading to the Computer History Museum! 01:42 The Great Parallel 03:31 Robotics, the Endgame 03:39 Why VLAs fall short 04:32 Video world models as the 2nd pretraining paradigm 06:09 World Action Models (WAM) 07:46 Strategies for robot data collection and the FSD equivalent to physical data flywheel for robot manipulation 11:06 EgoScale and the Dexterity Scaling Law we discovered recently 14:00 Physical RL: bridging the last mile 15:39 DreamDojo: an end-to-end neural physics engine for scaling RL in silico 17:00 Civilizational Technology Tree and my predictions for the near future. Spoiler: it's closer than you think. Thanks to my friends at Sequoia for inviting me back to AI Ascent this year! I had a blast! Last year's talk is attached in the thread if you missed it.
image_video.selection_reason: High-signal roadmap for Physical AGI and World Action Models from a leading expert.
image_video.summary: In his Sequoia AI Ascent presentation, Jim Fan detailed a roadmap for achieving physical AGI by drawing parallels to large language model development and introducing concepts like World Action Models.
image_video.display_title: Jim Fan outlines the roadmap to physical artificial general intelligence using world action models
key_points: The presentation introduces World Action Models as a second pretraining paradigm to overcome the limitations of vision-language-action models.
Researchers discovered a Dexterity Scaling Law using EgoScale to improve robot data collection and physical manipulation.
The roadmap highlights DreamDojo, an end-to-end neural physics engine designed to scale reinforcement learning in simulated environments.

Users only need to provide raw assets and a brief to initiate the generation process.
The tool eliminates the need for manual node configuration, prompting, or video editing.

image_video.title: AI video models with storyboards are a cheat code. You can now directly use ChatGPT Images 2.0 on...
image_video.content: AI video models with storyboards are a cheat code. You can now directly use ChatGPT Images 2.0 on Video Rebirth, and after generating an image, the one-click conversion to Montage feature can generate a full video. https://t.co/9Ev5BVw2uJ
image_video.selection_reason: New workflow integration between ChatGPT Images and Video Rebirth for storyboard-to-video generation
image_video.summary: Video Rebirth now allows users to generate images using ChatGPT Images 2.0 and instantly convert them into full videos using a new Montage feature.
image_video.display_title: Video Rebirth Integrates ChatGPT Images For One-Click Storyboard To Full Video Generation
key_points: The platform integrates directly with ChatGPT Images 2.0 for initial visual generation.
A one-click conversion tool transforms generated images into a complete video montage.
The workflow leverages storyboard-style generation to streamline AI video creation.

product_updates.title: Let Grok fetch your emails, improve your slides, declutter your calendar or organize your Notion....
product_updates.content: Let Grok fetch your emails, improve your slides, declutter your calendar or organize your Notion. Add your connectors to Grok today across all plans on iOS, Android and https://t.co/f3u3RwhHjk. https://t.co/KURU7gLd3m

product_updates.summary: Grok has launched new integration connectors across all its platforms, enabling the AI to directly manage emails, presentations, calendars, and Notion workspaces.
product_updates.display_title: Grok Introduces Third-Party App Connectors For Automated Workspace And Calendar Management
key_points: The update allows Grok to fetch emails, organize Notion, and declutter calendars.
Connectors are available to users on all subscription plans.
The feature is accessible across iOS, Android, and web platforms.

product_updates.title: SOMEONE JUST BUILT THE ALIGNMENT DIAGNOSTIC EVERY AI TEAM NEEDED BUT NOBODY HAD. One number. One...
product_updates.content: SOMEONE JUST BUILT THE ALIGNMENT DIAGNOSTIC EVERY AI TEAM NEEDED BUT NOBODY HAD. One number. One command. Any model. It's called iFixAi: → 32 inspections across fabrication, manipulation, deception, unpredictability, and opacity → The model never scores its own output. Cross-provider judge pairing is baked in. → Long responses get decomposed into individual claims and graded one by one → Every run writes a manifest any auditor reproduces byte for byte → compare A B command diffs two providers across all 5 categories side by side → Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure, Bedrock, and HuggingFace Maps to OWASP, NIST, EU AI Act, and ISO 42001. Ships with fixtures for healthcare, legal, finance, and engineering. 100% Open Source. Apache 2.0.
product_updates.selection_reason: New open-source alignment diagnostic tool mapping model behavior to global regulatory standards.
product_updates.summary: iFixAi is a new open-source diagnostic tool that evaluates AI models across 32 alignment categories using cross-provider judge pairing and reproducible manifests.
product_updates.display_title: Open-Source Diagnostic Tool iFixAi Offers Comprehensive Alignment Testing for AI Models
key_points: Evaluates models across 32 specific inspections including fabrication, deception, and opacity.
Features cross-provider judge pairing to ensure models never score their own outputs.
Maps directly to major compliance frameworks like OWASP, NIST, and the EU AI Act.

product_updates.title: Notebooks in Gemini bring organization to complex tasks. Take the grad school application process...
product_updates.content: Notebooks in Gemini bring organization to complex tasks. Take the grad school application process: With notebooks, you can gather your transcripts, essay drafts and admission requirements in one place, so Gemini can help track deadlines, give feedback, and assess your progress.
product_updates.selection_reason: Official update on Gemini Notebooks for complex task organization and workflow management
product_updates.summary: Gemini has introduced a Notebooks feature that allows users to consolidate documents and track progress for complex, multi-step projects in a single workspace.
product_updates.display_title: Google Introduces Notebooks in Gemini to Organize and Manage Complex User Workflows
key_points: Provides a centralized workspace to gather related files like transcripts and essay drafts.
Enables the AI to track deadlines, provide contextual feedback, and assess overall progress.
Designed to streamline complex organizational tasks such as university applications.

product_updates.title: The new reasoning audio model is getting a lot of attention, but GPT-Realtime-Translate might be...
product_updates.content: The new reasoning audio model is getting a lot of attention, but GPT-Realtime-Translate might be even cooler. It allows for realtime translation of any audio into countless language – a huge ask from businesses! Works well for livestreams, sermons, radio shows, etc...
product_updates.selection_reason: New real-time translation capabilities for reasoning audio models targeting enterprise use cases.
product_updates.summary: A new GPT-Realtime-Translate model enables instantaneous audio translation across multiple languages for live events and broadcasts.
product_updates.display_title: OpenAI Launches Real-Time Audio Translation Model for Live Broadcasting and Business Applications
key_points: Translates live audio streams into numerous languages in real time.
Targets business use cases including livestreams, radio shows, and public addresses.
Operates alongside the newly released reasoning audio model to expand voice capabilities.
